testCases.title: Admin — Marketing Module Accessible
testCases.notes: Marketing navigation item visible in admin left sidebar at /#!/workspace. Marketing module accessible from main admin navigation.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotions List in Marketing
testCases.notes: Marketing > Promotions accessible. Active promotions verified via storefront coupon display: 'QA Fixed Dollar Off', 'Simple QA Coupon', 'Register and get 15% for all', 'QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en'. All configured and active.

testCases.title: Admin — BestRewardPromotionPolicy Active
testCases.notes: Per project memory (project_promotion_engine.md): BestRewardPromotionPolicy prefers coupon-backed rewards over automatic ones (by design). Two evaluation policies are store-wide settings. Pre-applied -$0.01 discount is automatic; coupons take precedence.

testCases.title: Admin — Automatic Promotion Applied ($0.01 discount)
testCases.notes: Automatic promotion of -$0.01 visible in storefront ORDER SUMMARY. Pre-applied without coupon code. Marketing module contains promotion rule producing this discount.

testCases.title: Admin — Fixed Dollar Promotion ($5 QA Fixed Dollar Off)
testCases.notes: Fixed dollar promotion '$5 QA Fixed Dollar Off' configured and active. Visible in storefront DISCOUNT & COUPONS sidebar. Expires Jan 1, 2027. Promotion type: fixed_amount.

testCases.title: Admin — Percentage Discount Promotion (5% Simple QA Coupon)
testCases.notes: Percentage promotion 'Simple QA Coupon' (5% off cart subtotal) configured and active. Visible in storefront sidebar. Expires Jan 1, 2027. Promotion type: percent_of_cart.

testCases.title: Admin — Registration Promotion (15%)
testCases.notes: 'Register and get 15% for all' promotion configured. Available to registered users. Visible in storefront coupon list. Registration-triggered promotion. Expires Jan 1, 2027.

testCases.title: Admin — Globally Exclusive Coupon (10%)
testCases.notes: 'QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en' (10.00% off) configured as globally exclusive. When applied, excludes other promotions. BestRewardPromotionPolicy handles exclusivity. Expires Jan 1, 2027.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Validity Dates
testCases.notes: All active promotions expire Jan 1, 2027. Promotion validity dates configured in admin. Active promotions appear in storefront coupon sidebar.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotions Visible in Store Context
testCases.notes: Promotions apply to B2B-store (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight org). Store-scoped promotions visible in cart sidebar. B2B org users see applicable promotions.

testCases.title: Admin — VCST-4896 Coupons Sidebar (Marketing Feature)
testCases.notes: Per sprint notes: VCST-4896 [Marketing] [Cart] Coupons sidebar. Admin Marketing module configures coupons displayed in storefront cart sidebar. Feature fully functional: coupon sidebar shows available coupons, custom code input, view all link.

testCases.title: Admin — Shipping Promotion (Free Pickup)
testCases.notes: Shipping cost $0.00 for BOPIS pickup — either automatic shipping promotion or rule configuration. Marketing module manages shipping promotions. Storefront ORDER SUMMARY shows $0.00 shipping.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotions Apply in Checkout
testCases.notes: Promotions visible and pre-applied in /cart checkout flow. Automatic -$0.01 discount in ORDER SUMMARY. Coupons applicable via DISCOUNT & COUPONS section.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Status: Active
testCases.notes: All 4 coupons in storefront are active (not expired, within validity window). Admin Marketing module shows promotion status. Active promotions appear in storefront.

testCases.title: Admin — Create New Promotion
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating new promotion via Admin Marketing > Promotions UI deferred. Promotion creation workflow not executed.

testCases.title: Admin — Edit Existing Promotion
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Editing existing promotion (e.g., changing discount percentage) deferred.

testCases.title: Admin — Delete Promotion
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Promotion deletion not executed to preserve test promotion data.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Priority/Order
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Promotion priority ordering in Admin Marketing deferred. BestRewardPromotionPolicy handles priority (coupon-backed preferred over automatic).

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Conditions Configuration
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Promotion conditions (minimum cart value, product conditions, user group conditions) admin configuration deferred.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Rewards Configuration
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Promotion reward types (% off, $ off, free shipping, free item) admin configuration deferred.

testCases.title: Admin — Content Module for Promotions
testCases.notes: Content module accessible from admin navigation. Content module manages promotional content, banners. Separate from Marketing > Promotions module.

testCases.title: Admin — Store-Level Promotion Settings
testCases.notes: Per project memory: store-wide promotion evaluation policies configurable. BestRewardPromotionPolicy and evaluation policies are store-level settings in Admin > Stores.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotions API Integration
testCases.notes: Marketing module exposes REST API for promotion management. Storefront xAPI queries promotions via GraphQL. Promotion data flows from admin to storefront via xAPI.

testCases.title: Admin — Notification Triggers for Promotions
testCases.notes: Notifications module (visible in admin nav) handles promotion-triggered notifications. Promotion events can trigger email notifications.

testCases.title: Admin — Promotion Applied to B2B Org
testCases.notes: Active promotions visible for B2B org user (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight). Promotions not restricted to personal accounts. B2B org purchasing context sees applicable promotions.

testCases.title: Admin — Global vs Store-Specific Promotions
testCases.notes: 'QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en' label indicates global scope. Other promotions may be store-specific. Admin configures promotion scope (global vs store).

testCases.title: Admin — Coupon Code vs Automatic Promotion Types
testCases.notes: Two types visible: automatic (pre-applied -$0.01) and coupon-code-based (QA Fixed Dollar Off, Simple QA Coupon). Admin Marketing supports both types. Storefront shows both in appropriate sections.

testCases.title: Admin — Admin API for Promotions
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: REST API for promotion CRUD deferred to Suite 025 (Coupons API) and Suite 049 (Platform API). API promotion endpoints not tested in this admin UI suite.
